planets.name: Feel

artifacts.title: Feel receipt from 2024-06-17
artifacts.excerpt:
mixed feelings but the more i reflect on vibecamp, the more positive i feel about it.

regrets for not participating in many of the events i wanted to, not talking to/seeking out mutuals, mostly keeping to myself and feeling isolated.
artifacts.proof_of_search: Community Archive row → normalized post → topic planet. Terms: feel, now, ppl, don.

artifacts.title: Feel receipt from 2025-07-06
artifacts.excerpt: the idea of expressing myself on twitter is feeling weird recently. different from over a month ago when i was still cycling through off-and-on (hypo)mania. on phase had felt like "i can just say anything, i feel great". off phase: "i feel small & don't want to be seen"
artifacts.proof_of_search: Community Archive row → normalized post → topic planet. Terms: feel, now, ppl, don.

artifacts.title: Feel receipt from 2025-09-01
artifacts.excerpt:
yo i feel like i just passed through an important developmental threshold. was feeling abandoned by a select few ppl who i pinned my sense of safety onto.

but now i'm okay?

i don't actually need them and i can rely on an omnipresent friend network and myself?

W
artifacts.proof_of_search: Community Archive row → normalized post → topic planet. Terms: feel, now, ppl, don.

artifacts.title: Feel receipt from 2025-06-19
artifacts.excerpt:
this has continued to develop. getting a handle on different types of "energy" when attuning to people

can "push into" people who are open to it, and let people into me when i feel safe with them

"putting up a wall" is a thing too but haven't mastered it yet

feels like magic
artifacts.proof_of_search: Community Archive row → normalized post → topic planet. Terms: feel, now, ppl, don.

artifacts.title: Myself receipt from 2024-03-14
artifacts.excerpt:
still a way beginner meditator, i went on a @jhanatech retreat a few weeks ago, takeaways:
- used to make myself meditate bc it was "good for me", now i *want* to do it more
- learned forgiveness meditation, used it to process stuck emotions. a powerful tool i'll keep using.

artifacts.title: Myself receipt from 2024-06-08

and that it's my responsibility. no one is coming to save me except myself.

i consider myself to be in this bucket, only recently having glimpses of reality.
